title: Ed Sheeran, Bradley Cooper, Dakota Johnson Among A-Listers Pictured at Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce Wedding

captions.instagram: Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce got married in a star-studded, super-secret ceremony! Guests like Ed Sheeran and Bradley Cooper reportedly signed NDAs. qc.hyp: Ed Sheeran and Bradley Cooper were seen arriving at a wedding this week.  It was for Taylor Swift and Travis Kells, who tied the knot in New York.  The couple reportedly made every guest sign an NDA.  The nuptials happened at Madison Square Garden for the Associated Press.  Other A-listers spotted included Gigi Hadid, Zoe Kravitz, and Dakota Johnson.  Digital invitations were watermarked with gue
